name: node-glob
title: node-glob
description:
glob functionality for Node.js
node-glob is a glob implementation for Node.js
.
It features brace expansion, extended glob matching, globstar matching,
and can be invoked synchronously as well as asynchronously.
It uses minimatch for pattern matching.
.
Node.js is an event-based server-side javascript engine.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use node-glob because glob functionality for Node.js.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use node-glob as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair node-glob with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `node-glob --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
